questions.hindi: यह किताब मेरे द्वारा पढ़ी जाती है।
questions.english: This book is read by me.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Object + am/is/are/was/were + V3 (past participle) + by + subject
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This book is read by me."
questions.category: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past practice

questions.hindi: यह काम उसके द्वारा किया जाता है।
questions.english: This work is done by him.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Object + am/is/are/was/were + V3 (past participle) + by + subject
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This work is done by him."
questions.category: Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past practice
